backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that composes blob storage and authorization mixins, and exposes user profile CRUD, subscription management (invite-code-based recordPayment, isSubscribed, getSubscriptionStatus), and ICP ledger inter-canister call types with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs — covering the invite-code subscription UI replacement and the useActivateByInviteCode mutation hook.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short per-file summaries for all frontend source files, serving as a build-planning reference for the current state of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) for the design system including background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive variants.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Oisy-like Crypto Wallet' and mounting the app via the /src/main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app file that configures TanStack Router with an AuthLayout guard checking authentication, subscription status, and whitelist migration, redirecting unsubscribed users to /subscription and unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/components/GlassCard.tsx: Reusable glassmorphism card wrapper component supporting optional raised, hover, onClick, style, and className props with dark-theme CSS class variants.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that toggles between Login and Logout states using Internet Identity, clears the React Query cache on logout, and shows a loading spinner during the login flow.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Renders the application's sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, mobile menu, and a user avatar dropdown showing profile info and logout option.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: Modal dialog that prompts a new user to enter a display name and saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation to complete onboarding.
frontend/src/components/WalletAddressCar: Displays a labeled wallet address (ICP or EVM) with a truncated view, full-address tooltip, and a copy-to-clipboard button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, subscription status checks, payment recording, and invite-code activation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines dark-first OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for theming (colors, sidebar, charts) plus utility component classes like glass-card and teal-glow.
frontend/src/lib/walletStorage.ts: localStorage utility module that defines TypeScript interfaces for networks, tokens, transactions, watchlist, and whitelist entries, provides default EVM/ICP network configs, address validation functions, and CRUD helpers for persisting wallet data.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that displays the user's ICP and EVM wallet addresses, a mock portfolio summary with total value, native token balances, and quick-action navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing/login page with a hero background, feature highlights (security, multi-chain, speed, self-custody), and a prominent Internet Identity login CTA button.
frontend/src/pages/NetworksPage.tsx: Networks page that lists all configured networks as cards showing the user's derived address per network, ERC-20 tokens for EVM networks, and links to block explorers.
frontend/src/pages/SendPage.tsx: Multi-step send transaction page supporting ICP (native/token) and EVM networks, with network/token selection, whitelist address picker, address validation, and transaction confirmation/success flow.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionPage.tsx: Subscription activation page that validates a hardcoded invite code and calls an activation mutation, displaying active subscription status or an invite code entry form.
frontend/src/pages/TokensPage.tsx: ERC-20 token management page allowing users to add, delete, and edit balances of custom tokens associated with EVM networks, stored via walletStorage.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page that lists, searches, and allows deletion of recorded send transactions with status badges for success, failed, and pending states.
frontend/src/pages/WatchlistPage.tsx: Watchlist page for monitoring external addresses across networks, supporting add, delete, copy, and mock-refresh of balances, persisted per user principal.
frontend/src/pages/WhitelistPage.tsx: React page for managing a whitelist address book, supporting add/edit/delete of ICP native, ICP token, and EVM addresses with validation, copy-to-clipboard, and type badge display.
frontend/src/utils/addressDerivation.ts: Utility functions for deriving ICP and EVM addresses from a Principal, and truncating addresses for display; EVM address is derived via SHA-256 hash of the principal text.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, oklch-based color tokens (teal, surface, wallet, sidebar), shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the crypto wallet DApp's architecture, existing features, known issues, and current implementation details including an invite-code-based subscription/access-control system on ICP.
